PreToolUse.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook vscode-copilot pretooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'

PostToolUse.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook vscode-copilot posttooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'
